title: index-loop in validate_stmt should use iterator
description: validate_stmt uses a manual while/index loop (i += 1 / i += 2) to scan the form slice. The i += 2 skip for :comparator <name> is easy to get wrong when editing. Suggested rewrite: use a peekable iterator. Replace the while loop with: let mut iter = stmt.iter().peekable(); while let Some(f) = iter.next() { match f { Form::Tag(t) if t == "comparator" => { if let Some(Form::Str(name)) = iter.peek() { /* validate */ iter.next(); } } ... } }. This makes the consume-two-at-once intent explicit and removes the raw index arithmetic.
